properties.description: Mapping Data Flow for SSIS Data Flow Task: Data Flow Task

sources.name: Flat_File_Source
sources.description: Source from SSIS FlatFileSource: Flat File Source

sinks.name: OLE_DB_Destination
sinks.description: Sink from SSIS OleDbDestination: OLE DB Destination

conditions.name: Perfect_Match
conditions.expression: #{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_in} == #{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_out}

conditions.name: Conditional_Split_Default_Output
conditions.expression: /* TODO: condition for Conditional Split Default Output */

transformations.name: Fuzzy_Grouping
transformations.description: [UNSUPPORTED — FuzzyGrouping] Manual implementation required. This component has no ADF Mapping Data Flow equivalent.

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        LASTNAME as string,
        FIRSTNAME as string,
        TITLE as string
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> Flat_File_Source
Flat_File_Source split(Perfect_Match: (#{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_in} == #{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_out}), Conditional_Split_Default_Output: (/* TODO: condition for Conditional Split Default Output */),
    disjoint: true) ~> Conditional_Split
Conditional_Split derive(/* TODO: Wait */) ~> Fuzzy_Grouping
Fuzzy_Grouping select(mapColumn(
        TITLE_clean
    )) ~> OLE_DB_Destination_mapped
OLE_DB_Destination_mapped sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
    deletable: false,
    insertable: true,
    updateable: false,
    upsertable: false) ~> OLE_DB_Destination
scriptLines: Flat_File_Source split(Perfect_Match: (#{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_in} == #{Package\Data Flow Task\Fuzzy Grouping.OutputsFuzzy Grouping Output.Columns_key_out}), Conditional_Split_Default_Output: (/* TODO: condition for Conditional Split Default Output */),
